allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("d:\\baburam-portfolio\\public\\baburam.jpg"\); $img.Save\("d:\\baburam-portfolio\\public\\baburam.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $img.Dispose\(\); Get-Item "d:\\baburam-portfolio\\public\\baburam.png" | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $procId = $_.OwningProcess; $p = Get-Process -Id $procId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Stopping PID $procId \($\($p.ProcessName\)\) on port 3000"; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force } } else { Write-Output "No process listening on port 3000." })
